mapper.select: SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_programs WHERE epg_source_id = #{sourceId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY channel_name, start_time
SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_programs WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, epg_source_id, channel_id, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM epg_programs WHERE epg_source_id = #{sourceId} AND channel_id = #{channelId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time

SELECT ec.channel_id as channelId, ec.display_name ->> '$[0].value' as channelName, COUNT(*) as programCount FROM epg_programs ep left join epg_channels ec ON ep.channel_id = ec.channel_id AND ec.deleted = 0 WHERE ep.epg_source_id = #{sourceId} AND ep.deleted = 0 GROUP BY channelName ORDER BY channelName
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO epg_programs ( epg_source_id, channel_id, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{epgSourceId}, #{channelId}, #{startTime}, #{stopTime}, #{title, typeHandler=com.lemongo97.iptv.iptvmanager.entity.EpgProgram$TitleTypeHandler}, #{subTitle}, #{description, typeHandler=com.lemongo97.iptv.iptvmanager.entity.EpgProgram$DescriptionTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, 0 )

INSERT INTO epg_programs ( epg_source_id, channel_id, start_time, stop_time, title, sub_title, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
(#{program.epgSourceId}, #{program.channelId}, #{program.startTime}, #{program.stopTime}, #{program.title, typeHandler=com.lemongo97.iptv.iptvmanager.entity.EpgProgram$TitleTypeHandler}, #{program.subTitle}, #{program.description, typeHandler=com.lemongo97.iptv.iptvmanager.entity.EpgProgram$DescriptionTypeHandler}, #{program.createdAt}, #{program.updatedAt}, 0)
